units.description: Length invariant: dist has length n, equal to the number of vertices.
common_failure_modes: stating an upper bound instead of equality
forgetting to anchor the source distance

units.description: Reachability witness: if dist[v] = Some(k), there is a directed path from source to v using exactly k edges.
common_failure_modes: stating the weaker 'v is reachable' without length

units.description: Minimality: if dist[v] = Some(k), no path uses fewer than k edges.
common_failure_modes: confusing the minimal and any-path formulations

units.description: Unreachability: dist[v] = None iff no path exists from source to v.
common_failure_modes: only stating one direction of the iff
conflating 'no path' with 'path of length > bound'
